cases.topic: suy nghĩ của khách hàng về vay nhanh tiền mặt qua FE Credit
cases.timeframe: Tap trung vao 6 thang gan nhat va cac bai co trai nghiem that ve phi, lai suat, bi lua, uy tin.
cases.audience: Tap trung vao feedback cua nguoi vay that, khong lay bai quang cao hoac bai tu nhan vien sales.
cases.comparison_policy: Neu co so sanh thi uu tien so sanh FE Credit voi app vay tien khac theo trai nghiem that.
cases.vision_policy: Neu post co screenshot hop dong, bang phi, lich su tru tien, hoac canh bao lua dao thi uu tien crawl va doc OCR.
expectation: run duoc queue/anmit an toan neu co run khac
co accepted evidence va label -> answer closeout
query posture trust/fraud/complaint xuat hien som hon
co audit cho reformulated query neu path dau yeu
success_signals: theme_results > 0 neu accepted set du dieu kien

cases.topic: review mặt nạ ngũ hoa trước sau khi dùng
cases.timeframe: Tap trung vao 6 thang gan nhat, uu tien bai review co anh truoc sau, screenshot feedback, hoac hinh bao bi.
cases.audience: Tap trung vao nguoi dung da dung san pham that, loai bo bai ban hang, inbox, va bai affiliate.
cases.comparison_policy: Neu co so sanh thi uu tien trai nghiem that ve kich ung, mun, da nhay cam, hieu qua.
cases.vision_policy: Uu tien bai co image before-after, image OCR, screenshot feedback, hoac hinh bao bi co text.
expectation: co it nhat mot path trigger image fallback neu production tim thay bai co hinh anh
neu khong tim thay, bao cao ro vision van chua duoc kich hoat tren production case nay
success_signals: judge_used_image_understanding > 0 hoac report neu khong co image-bearing evidence
accepted_with_image > 0 hoac ket luan ro rang vi sao chua dat
